summary: Iteration 115 - Agent Terrain PDC Visit Workflow Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 failed due to rate limiting on cooperative login). Frontend: All 9 steps of the Visite PDC form verified working. Navigation, GPS buttons, photo capture, signature canvases, and complete visit button all present and functional.

minor.issue: Rate limiting triggered (429) after multiple test attempts - not a bug, expected security behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Backend agent-visit endpoint correctly creates new PDC or updates existing one for the farmer
Backend complete-visit endpoint correctly changes status to 'complete_agent' and creates notification for cooperative
Frontend AgentVisitePDC.jsx has all 9 steps implemented: Identification, Ménage, Parcelles & GPS, Inventaire Arbres, Matériel, Stratégie, Photos, Signatures, Résumé
Signature canvas component supports both mouse and touch drawing
GPS capture buttons present on parcels and trees steps
Photo upload button present on Photos step
Complete visit button triggers complete-visit API

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 9 steps verified, all key elements present)

seed_data_creation: Test PDC created via agent-visit endpoint with farmer_id TEST_FARMER_VISIT_115
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Terrain PDC Visit workflow fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/ars1000/pdc/agent-visit (create/update PDC), POST /api/ars1000/pdc/{id}/complete-visit (complete visit, send notification). Frontend page: /agent/visite-pdc with 9 steps. Navigation from AgentTerrainDashboard via 'Visite Terrain PDC' form option in FARMER_FORMS list.

frontend_ui: 9 step tabs present (Identification, Ménage, Parcelles & GPS, Inventaire Arbres, Matériel, Stratégie, Photos, Signa, Résumé) - PASSED
Complete visit button present on Résumé step - PASSED
